title: RBI (Small Finance Banks Cash Reserve Ratio and Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Second Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI has granted CRR and SLR exemption for eligible FCNR(B) deposits mobilized between June 8 and September 30, 2026. The move is aimed at attracting foreign currency funds into the banking system.
The post RBI (Small Finance Banks Cash Reserve Ratio and Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
